title: The NIH BRAIN Initiative's impacts in systems and computational neuroscience and team-scale research 2014-2023.
authors: NIH BRAIN Initiative Integrative and Quantitative Neuroscience Team
author_string: Bader, Farah, Bingham, Clayton, David, Karen K, Gebrehiwet, Hermon, Lantz, Crystal L et al.
abstract: At the 10-year anniversary of the NIH BRAIN Initiative, this report analyzes the impact of the initiative's functional neuroscience ecosystem as funding experiments in the domains of systems and integrative neuroscience, and computational neuroscience, with an eye on comparison with other funding models and best practices.
